pi_items.source: Jenkins naming conventions - arbitrary custom names are supported for tool installations
/opt/ is standard Linux location for third-party software installations; /opt/java/openjdk is valid custom OpenJDK path
Jenkins naming conventions - arbitrary custom names including version are supported for tool installations
Maven 3.9.6 is a real Apache Maven release (released December 1, 2023) available at https://maven.apache.org/docs/3.9.6/release-notes.html and https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.6/

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Jenkins Global Tool Configuration with JDK-17 (JAVA_HOME: /opt/java/openjdk) and Maven-3.9.6 with auto-install enabled. All metadata values are verified as correct: JDK-17 is a valid custom naming convention for a JDK installation in Jenkins, /opt/java/openjdk is a valid Linux path for OpenJDK, and Maven-3.9.6 is a real Apache Maven release (released December 1, 2023) available for Jenkins auto-installation.
